2.0.1.en: Faster polling (10s), outdoor sensor battery alarm, 10 new Flow Conditions (temperature, humidity, UV, light, pressure, rain, battery), fixed daily rainfall overcounting

2.0.2.en: New app artwork and a dedicated driver icon, plus a cleaned-up store description.

2.0.3.en: Daily rainfall now matches the station display exactly (no more overcounting).

2.0.4.en: Added an optional local connection via the Tuya local protocol. Enter the station's IP address and Local Key in the device settings to receive data locally — faster and independent of the cloud quota. Without these settings the app keeps working via the cloud as before.
